nano-banana._setup: Get free Gemini API key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey then add GEMINI_API_KEY to .env

_required_env_vars.GEMINI_API_KEY: Google Gemini API key for Nano Banana image generation. Free at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
_required_env_vars.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Anthropic API key for LLM extraction. Required for pipeline.
_required_env_vars.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: Supabase anon key for litigation database. Optional but recommended.
